blocking_findings.summary: Split plan omitted explicit target assignments for context-pack snapshot truncation, provider-context dual-call, and next-action provider default tests.
Plan review gate remained pending and must pass before any test movement.
Agent-executor and verified-provider/closeout boundaries were ambiguous and could create a near-threshold replacement shard.

non_blocking_findings: Parity artifact schema should be explicit.
WORKBENCH_SERVER_TEST_FILES helper update should be named in the plan.
Manifest registration wording should cover all extracted shards that require governance, not only near-threshold files.

required_delta_changes: Map all current root tests to explicit retained or target shard locations.
Add per-shard line-count budgets and split provider/agent/closeout clusters to avoid a near-threshold shard.
Name parity schema, WORKBENCH_SERVER_TEST_FILES update, and manifest compatibility checks before implementation.
